title: Retail Sales Associate
description:
About us

Love and Bravery is a women’s label that seeks to create a collection of statement pieces and everyday wear for the modern woman. Our pieces are thoughtfully crafted, with a focus on quality, cut and wearability. We’re proud to be a brand that is designed in Singapore.

If you are highly motivated, thrive on a challenge and are looking for a new adventure, then we would love to hear from you!

Responsibilities:

We are looking for a friendly, out-going, customer-focused Retail Sales Associate to join our team. You will be responsible for delivering a positive shopping experience, assisting customers with product selection, and supporting daily store operations to meet sales targets.

  • Greet and assist customers in a warm, professional manner
  • Understand customer needs and recommend suitable products
  • Achieve store sales targets
  • Handle cashiering duties, including POS transactions and cash handling
  • Maintain store cleanliness and visual merchandising standards
  • Assist with stock receiving, replenishment, and inventory checks
  • Support promotions, campaigns, and peak period operations
  • Handle customer feedback and basic after-sales queries professionally
  • Follow company policies, procedures, and service standards

Requirements

  • Proficiency in English
  • Prior retail or customer service experience preferred (fashion retail is a plus)
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills
  • Positive attitude and willingness to learn
  • Ability to work retail hours, including weekends and public holidays
  • Team player with a sense of responsibility and reliability
  • Comfortable with standing for long hours
  • Friendly, helpful, confident, and engaging personality
  • A strong advocate for the Love and Bravery brand

postedCompany.description:
Love and Bravery is a women’s label that creates everyday wear for the modern woman. Our pieces are thoughtfully crafted, with a focus on quality, cut and wearability.  We’re proud to be a brand that is designed in Singapore.

Founded in 2005, Love & Bravery started with a vision to inspire women to live better through dressing better.

We're constantly on a lookout for individuals who are passionate about fashion, creative and highly motivated to deliver their best.

Discover more about us @loveandbravery on Instagram!
